args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Opportunity opp ON opp.Id = oi.OrderId
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON opp.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < DATE '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT opp.OwnerId, SUM(oli.Quantity * pbe.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity opp
JOIN Contract c ON opp.ContractID__c = c.Id
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON opp.Id = oli.OpportunityId
JOIN products_orders.PricebookEntry pbe ON oli.PricebookEntryId = pbe.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY opp.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT opp.OwnerId, SUM(oli.Quantity * pbe.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity opp
JOIN Contract c ON opp.ContractID__c = c.Id
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON opp.Id = oli.OpportunityId
JOIN products_orders.PricebookEntry pbe ON oli.PricebookEntryId = pbe.Id
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY opp.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT opp.OwnerId, SUM(oli.Quantity * oli.TotalPrice / NULLIF(oli.Quantity, 0)) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity opp
JOIN Contract c ON opp.ContractID__c = c.Id
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON opp.Id = oli.OpportunityId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY opp.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT opp.OwnerId, SUM(oli.Quantity * oli.TotalPrice / NULLIF(oli.Quantity, 0)) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity opp
JOIN Contract c ON opp.ContractID__c = c.Id
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON opp.Id = oli.OpportunityId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY opp.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT opp.OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oli.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * CAST(oli.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(CAST(oli.Quantity AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS sales_amount
FROM Opportunity opp
JOIN Contract c ON opp.ContractID__c = c.Id
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON opp.Id = oli.OpportunityId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY opp.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT opp.OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oli.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * CAST(oli.TotalPrice AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(CAST(oli.Quantity AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS sales_amount

JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON opp.Id = oli.OpportunityId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
